camera_notes: Deck-level side view. Individual swimmer technique visible — body line, hip position, head angle, torso elevation, and elbow path are all assessable. Underwater mechanics (hand pitch, wrist rotation) not visible without underwater footage.

flagged_timestamps.fault_summary: Swimmer exits water too high — hips forced low, significant drag
Poor head position, chin not tucked; not rising high enough during breath
Hips too low, chest cannot clear water sufficiently
Elbows at chest level during catch instead of rib cage/lower EVF position
Head looking straight ahead during glide — increased drag, disrupted body line
Hips dropped very low — significant drag, horizontal body line lost
